/usr/bin/gcc -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -O3 -march=native -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fno-exceptions -g -fsanitize=address,undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_css_selector_matching.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_css_selector_matching.dir/tests/test_css_selector_matching.c.o CMakeFiles/test_css_selector_matching.dir/src/memory/arena.c.o CMakeFiles/test_css_selector_matching.dir/src/memory/pool.c.o CMakeFiles/test_css_selector_matching.dir/src/memory/refcount.c.o CMakeFiles/test_css_selector_matching.dir/src/document/css_selector_match.c.o -o test_css_selector_matching  -ldom -lexpat -lwapcaplet -lhubbub -lparserutils -lm
